message:
fix: reduce false Connection lost and Save failed alerts (#3190)

* fix: increase health check failure threshold to reduce false Connection lost

Raise FAILURE_THRESHOLD from 2 to 3 consecutive failures before showing
the "Connection lost" banner. Navigating between heavy dashboard pages
and Settings can stall the main thread long enough to miss a health poll
cycle, causing false positives with only 2 failures required.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: reduce false "Connection lost" and "Save failed" during page transitions

HTTP/1.1 limits browsers to 6 concurrent connections per origin. When
multiple SSE streams saturate the pool, health checks and settings saves
get queued and time out, triggering false disconnection alerts.

- Health check: reduce timeout 10s→3s, raise failure threshold 3→4
- Settings save: increase timeout 5s→15s, add 1 retry with 3s delay
- Cluster filter: use reachable !== false (not === true) so clusters
  pending health checks aren't excluded, fixing empty card on load
- Prefetch settings and clusters chunks to eliminate first-load delay

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,10 +1,13 @@
 import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
-import { FETCH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS } from '../lib/constants/network'
 
 export type BackendStatus = 'connected' | 'disconnected' | 'connecting'
 
 const POLL_INTERVAL = 15000 // Check every 15 seconds
-const FAILURE_THRESHOLD = 2 // Require 2 consecutive failures
+const FAILURE_THRESHOLD = 4 // Require 4 consecutive failures before showing "Connection lost"
+// Short timeout for health checks — a healthy backend responds in <100ms.
+// Using the default 10s timeout causes false failures when the browser's
+// HTTP/1.1 connection pool (6 per origin) is saturated by SSE streams.
+const HEALTH_CHECK_TIMEOUT_MS = 3000
 
 interface BackendState {
   status: BackendStatus
@@ -79,7 +82,7 @@ class BackendHealthManager {
       const response = await fetch('/health', {
         method: 'GET',
         headers: { Accept: 'application/json' },
-        signal: AbortSignal.timeout(FETCH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS),
+        signal: AbortSignal.timeout(HEALTH_CHECK_TIMEOUT_MS),
       })
 
       if (response.ok) {
